name: Chinese Stir-Fried Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup chicken stock or bouillon (1/4 to 1/2)
1 Tablespoon soy sauce (can be low sodium type) or chopped black bean sauce (available in Oriental markets)
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard the tough fibrous ends of the asparagus.
2. Cut the stalks diagonally into 1 to 1 1/2-inch sections.
3. If desired, briefly blanch the stalks by cooking them in boiling water or using a microwave.
4. Combine the stock, soy sauce, and sugar in a bowl.
5. Heat the oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
6. Add the asparagus to the hot oil and stir-fry until coated with oil, about 2 minutes.
7. Pour in the stock mixture and continue stir-frying for another 1-2 minutes.
8. Stir in the green onion and cook for an additional minute or until the asparagus is tender.
9. Serve hot, garnished with extra green onions if desired. Serves 3 to 4.
